    Resume

    Jiyoung Kim

    📍 South Korea  |  ✉️ shchj66@gmail.com  |  📞 +82)10-2534-8251  |  LinkedIn  |  Blog

    Professional Summary

    Senior Java Backend Engineer with 10+ years of experience at NHN, specializing in payment systems, checkout flows, and PG/PSP integrations. Experienced in building and maintaining backend services for large-scale payment platforms, with a strong focus on system reliability, legacy modernization, and safe delivery in production environments. Proven ability to work across complex payment domains including checkout, payment authorization, discount logic, and external payment gateway integrations.

    Core Skills

    Java Spring Spring Boot REST API SQL Payment Systems Checkout Flows PG/PSP Integration Legacy System Maintenance Coupon/Discount Logic Backend Service Development Production Troubleshooting

    Professional Experience

    Java Backend Engineer January 2014 – Present
    NHN

    Worked on multiple backend projects related to payment platforms, checkout flows, external payment integrations, and legacy system improvement. Contributed to production systems requiring stability, careful change management, and reliable coordination with internal and external services.

    Payment Platform Backend

    • Built and maintained backend services for a PAYCO-style digital payment platform.
    • Supported core payment flows including checkout, payment authorization, and transaction processing.
    • Contributed to stable operation and continuous improvement of production payment services.

    Korean PG/PSP Integrations

    • Implemented and maintained integrations with Korean payment providers, including KCP and Hecto.
    • Handled provider-specific request and response mapping, operational edge cases, and troubleshooting.
    • Supported reliable payment processing by adapting backend systems to external provider requirements.

    Japanese PSP Integrations via PG Proxy

    • Contributed to integrations with Japanese payment providers through an intermediate PG proxy layer.
    • Implemented backend functionality based on proxy-defined interfaces rather than direct provider-level APIs.
    • Supported Japan-focused payment flows while working within an indirect integration architecture.

    Legacy Coupon / Discount Engine Improvement

    • Worked on improving a legacy coupon and discount engine in an older payment system.
    • Addressed maintainability issues caused by business rules being distributed across multiple parts of the system.
    • Focused on making changes safely in a regression-sensitive environment with high operational impact.

    Education

    Bachelor's Degree in Electronic Engineering
    Soongsil University · Seoul, Korea

    Languages

    • Korean — Native
    • English — Professional working proficiency
